title: GoalExecutedPayload (v1)
description: Payload of a `goal_executed` event — records one run's terminal outcome. Recurring goals emit this repeatedly. See spec/goal-lifecycle-v1.md §5.2.

summary.description: Up to ~200 characters of the agent's response text for this run.

tool_calls.description: Number of tool calls performed during the run.

memories.description: Number of memory nodes formed during the run.
